# BSDL — Britx Software Design Language

> Constitution and operating framework for how britx (Pedro Henrique Bahia Brito) designs, builds, ships, and maintains software — written to be consumed by AI copilots as guardrails and retrieval context.

Canonical text lives in this repository under `bsdl/`. The wiki and website are derived views.

## Constitution (read first)

- [Constitution index](bsdl/constitution/README.md): how to read it, the constitution map, the working rule
- [Preamble](bsdl/constitution/preamble.md): why BSDL exists
- [Foundations](bsdl/constitution/foundations.md): worldview, ontology, epistemology, axiology, ethics
- [Principles](bsdl/constitution/principles.md): the ten constitutional principles
- [Engineering Laws](bsdl/constitution/engineering-laws.md): principles as operational constraints
- [Derived Frameworks](bsdl/constitution/derived-frameworks.md): lifecycle/architecture selection, AI collaboration model, documentation and failure models
- [Reference Implementations](bsdl/constitution/reference-implementations.md): templates and heuristics

## Body of the language

- [Knowledge Base](bsdl/knowledge-base.md)
- [Architecture, Design & Modeling](bsdl/architecture-design-modeling.md)
- [Artificial Intelligence](bsdl/artificial-intelligence.md)
- [Standards](bsdl/standards.md)
- [Development](bsdl/development.md)
- [Operations](bsdl/operations.md)
- [Patterns](bsdl/patterns.md)
- [Glossary](bsdl/glossary.md)

## Operating framework (BSF)

- [START_HERE](START_HERE.md): mandatory AI onboarding sequence
- [PROJECT_RULES](PROJECT_RULES.md): governance, delegation levels, documentation standards
- [Agents](agents/README.md): AI role definitions
- [Decision Engine](decisions/README.md): pre-made policy answers

- [Resources](bsdl/resources.md)
